name: Segmented Button Group
description: Layout wrapper that groups related actionable buttons into a flush segmented control.

children.description: Buttons or button-like controls rendered as grouped segmented actions.

className.description: Optional class name for custom styling.

slots.default: Segmented action items, typically Salt Button components of the same variant.

keyboard: Tab — enters group and moves focus through buttons in tab order
Shift+Tab — moves focus backward through buttons and out of group
aria: Follow Button accessibility guidance for nested controls
For icon-only buttons, provide accessible names (aria-label) and tooltip content
